def test_12_order_page_load(self):
        """OL-02: 订单列表"""
        self._switch_tab('/pages/order/order', 4)
        order = OrderPage(self.mini)
        order.refresh_page()
        time.sleep(2)
        tab_count = order.get_tab_count()
        self.assertGreater(tab_count, 0, '订单 Tab 为空')
        print(f'  Tab 数量: {tab_count}')
